name: Find My Phone App - The Game

reviews.review_description:
The game is very funny,
 Has alot of hidden things to interact with and the worlds immersive but is very short beat in like 10 mins. I would buy again if longer.

reviews.review_title: Cute. It's an object hunting adventure.
reviews.review_description: I'm not sure if you find your phone, I think the game bugged on me and I couldnt complete it, but I assume everything works out in the end.
The ending was funny great for a 20 minute experience.

reviews.review_title: It’s not too good but it’s good
reviews.review_description: The gameplay was OK it’s just the lagginess. Send me walking out the door. Yeah I’ll give it a five out of 10.
Finally found my phone
Throwing a jar of bees in slow motion is truly a moving experience. I have become a better man since the slow motion feature. I am truly grateful for such innovation.
Fun short, little game with interesting mechanics. I recommend it🗿
I love the story I love how you lost the phone and you have to find it with this tablet
Its free and its funny! Just download it! Why not?
It's a shorter game than Shadow Point.

reviews.review_title: It’s nothing spectacular but I love it
reviews.review_description: For what it is it’s quite a fun free comedy piece. The humor was fun and hearing them describe very basic things was really fun. I really recommend downloading this especially since it’s free. Don’t expect any grand gameplay or amazing visuals though, that’s not the point of this. My only real critique is that the tablet controls were a bit annoying from what I remember, i think my issue was it was constantly out and I found that a tad annoying. It’s been months since I played this though so take that with a grain of salt 😅. Very funny stuff though, great job guys! 💙 you definitely succeeded at making a fun little game.
All I can say, kind buggy, very pog
it's free

reviews.review_title: What a fun, hilarious little game!
reviews.review_description:
This game was a bright spot in the day. Really enjoyed the bit at the end, I don't want to spoil it.

I did have some control glitches, but once I realized I didn't have to "hold" the tablet it was easier. Took me a while to figure out how to move, but that's on me.

Overall, just a smile-inducing good time. And you can't beat the price!
Idk if theres a smooth locomotion option but if there was it would remove many bugs also theres just a random door into the abyss in the main characters house idk why but there is.
Just a fun quirky little game to play and have a laugh :)
Cool

:)
  


And no virus

I was playing and it put me a VIRUS
🦠

When playing the game I thought I would come back here and write a 4 star review because of the many bug. But then I remembered this game was free. And it left me feeling satisfied each level putting a smile on my face and a release of relief when I finished one that I was having particular difficulty with. Then the ending. I’m not going to spoil it but the satisfaction was through the roof, you’ll understand after you’ve played the game (;
